hero.title: Immigration guidance backed by specialized legal support
hero.subtitle: We support your immigration process with professional guidance, clear strategy, and specialized attorneys.

about.title: A firm focused on protecting your immigration future
about.text: International Advisors is an organization specialized in immigration services, supported by attorneys and advisors experienced in legal processes, documentation, and immigration strategy.
about.featureText1: We work with trained professionals to review, guide, and support your process.
about.featureText2: Each case is reviewed individually to define a clear and realistic path.

trust.title: Serious support for important decisions
trust.text: We understand that an immigration process can change your life. That is why we work with confidentiality, clear communication, and personalized attention.
trust.cardText1: Your information is handled responsibly and discreetly.
trust.cardText2: We guide you through preparing, reviewing, and organizing your documents.
trust.cardText3: We provide legal support for complex immigration processes.
trust.cardText4: We explain every stage in simple and direct language.

services.title: Immigration solutions for individuals, families, and companies
services.serviceText1: Guidance for visa applications, renewals, temporary permits, and related processes.
services.serviceText2: Guidance for temporary residency, permanent residency, family reunification, and regularization.
services.serviceText3: Case evaluation, legal strategy, and support with specialized attorneys.

process.title: An organized, clear, and professional process
process.stepText1: We listen to your situation, goals, and immigration background.
process.stepText2: We define the best route according to your profile, destination country, and documentation.
process.stepText3: We follow up on each stage so you can move forward with clarity and confidence.
process.panelTitle: Your immigration project deserves expert guidance
process.panelText: Schedule an initial consultation to understand your options and build an action plan.

blogPreview.title: Articles about immigration and legal updates

blogPage.title: Immigration guides and legal updates
blogPage.text: Explore articles about visas, residency, permits, legal processes, and immigration news.

postPage.title: Article
postPage.text: Read immigration content designed to guide your decisions.

footer.description: Immigration services with legal support, professional strategy, and personalized attention.
